titleStmt.title: SII 28.133: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 133. (A.R. No. 288 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, north wall.

Records an order (ōlai) issued through Villavadaraiyaṉ addressed to the several authorities concerned with the administration of the temple, approving the action of mūlaparushaiyār of Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr exempting from payment of kaḍamai, kuḍimai, paṇikkottu, kaḷḷa-piḍi, veṭṭi, śennīramañji, on a vēli of land purchased and gifted as maintenance (jīvaṉam) of those tending (tiru-ttoṇḍar) the garden called taḍuttāṭkoṇḍāṉ-tirunandavanam, after setting up, for supplying flowers for the garlands for God Mudaliyār and Goddess Nāchchiyār, by Amima . lu-ḻāṉvēḷāṉ Śūriyadēvaṉ alias Koṅgarāyar. The garden and the other jīvaṉam land gifted lay in Kaḍavāchchēri alias Tillaināyaka-nallūr in Gaṅgaikoṇḍachōḻappēriḷamai-nāḍu, a western hamlet of Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr. The record was authorised to be inscribed in Kulōttuṅgachōḻaṉ-tirumāḷigai. (That the hamlets of Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr are stated to be lying in different nāḍus is indicative of the fact that Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr was a taṉi-ūr, having control over several hamlets though they were lying in different nāḍus surrounding Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr.)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ— Aṉaittulakuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrīsundara pāṇṭiya tevarkku yāṇṭu Oṉpatāvatu nāḷ Irunūṟiṉāl villavatarayaṉ Olai kūṟu teṉṉavaṉ brahmārāyarum vikkiramacoḻabrahmārāyarum jayatuṅkappallavaraiyarum kurukulattaraiyarum Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār koyil śrīmāheśvara kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum cāmutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum kovil nāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikaiStone containing this portion of record is missing. paṇṭārap pottakamuṭaiyārkaḷum kaṇakkarum kaṇṭu viṭu
tantatāvatu mutaliyārkkum nācciyārkkum cāttiyaruḷa naṭuvil nāṭāṉa Irācarāca vaḷanāṭṭu tirumuṉaippāṭi Iṭaiyāṟṟu nāṭṭu Iṭaiyāṟṟu Aṉu ṉuḻāṉ veḷāṉ cūriyatevaṉāṉa koṅkarāyar perumpaṟṟappuliyūr melpiṭākai kaṅkaikoṇṭa coḻapperiḷamai nāṭṭuk kaṭavācceriyāṉa tillaināyakanallūril ceyvitta taṭuttāṭkoṇṭāṉ tirunantavaṉamāṉa nilamum tiruStone containing this portion of the record is missing. caykiṟa tiruttoṇṭarkaḷumakkuRead tiruttoṇṭarkaḷukkum jivaṉattukku Ivar koṇṭu
viṭṭa Ivvūrppāl śrīsundaracoḻavatikku meṟkku Uttama coḻavāykkā(l)lukku teṟku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattu Uḻaiccāṇaṉ naṭṭaṉnakāṉMay be read as nakkaṉ pakkalum vācciyaṉ certtaṉa vīraṉ pakkalum vilaikoṇṭa Āṭavalla viḷākam Eṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilam mukkāle Orumāvum Ikkaṭṭaḷaiyil Uḻaiccāṇaṉ naṭṭaṉnakāMay be read as nakkaṉṉ pakkal vilai koṇ caṉṉā viḷākameṉṟum paṭṭamula�Stone containing this portion of the record is missing. ṭppaṭṭa nilattu vilaikoṇṭa nilam nālu māvum Ākappala I
ṭaippāṭṭāl nilam veliyum tirunantavaṉañ ceykiṟa tiruttoṇṭarkaḷukku jīvaṉattukku Ivar viṭṭu Iṉnilattukku kaṭamai kuṭimai paṇikkottu virapokamaṭavarici tiruvaraṅku koyiṟkuṭimai kaḷḷapiṭi veṭṭi ceṉṉīramañci Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṉaittuvaṟkkaṅkaḷum taviruvatāka Iṟaiyiliyāka perumpaṟṟappuliyūr mulaparuṣaiyār Eḻutiṉa niyokappaṭiye taviravum Ippaṭikku kulottuṅka coḻaṉ tirumāḷikaiStone containing this portion of the record is missing. l veṭṭavum paṇṇuvate Ippaṭi ceyyappaṇṇuvate Ivai
villavatarayaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 28.133 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
